# Project Standards

This repository contains build tooling for the example service. Use the
scripts below when making changes, and keep the documentation current.

## Build and Test

- Run scripts/build.sh to compile the project before testing changes.
- Read [docs/api.md](docs/api.md) for the API reference.

## Conventions

- Keep functions under 50 lines.
- Prefer descriptive variable names over abbreviations.
